title: Argumentative Essay Structure
description: Thesis, body paragraphs with claim-evidence-analysis, counter-argument, conclusion.
summary_pt_br: Ensaio argumentativo: tese, 2-3 parágrafos (afirmação+evidência+análise), contra-argumento, conclusão.

scenes.subtitle_en: Thesis, body paragraphs with claim-evidence-analysis, counter-argument, conclusion.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Ensaio argumentativo: tese, 2-3 parágrafos (afirmação+evidência+análise), contra-argumento, conclusão.

scenes.text_en: Thesis, body paragraphs with claim-evidence-analysis, counter-argument, conclusion. Today's focus: argumentative essay structure. This essay argues that remote work strengthens productivity.
scenes.text_pt: Ensaio argumentativo: tese, 2-3 parágrafos (afirmação+evidência+análise), contra-argumento, conclusão. Foco de hoje: argumentative essay structure. Este ensaio defende que o home office fortalece a produtividade.

scenes.title: Argumentative Essay Structure
scenes.body_en: Classic structure: intro with thesis → 2-3 body paragraphs (each: claim + evidence + analysis) → counter-argument + rebuttal → conclusion that restates thesis with new insight.
scenes.body_pt: Ensaio argumentativo: tese, 2-3 parágrafos (afirmação+evidência+análise), contra-argumento, conclusão.

examples.en: This essay argues that remote work strengthens productivity.
examples.pt: Este ensaio defende que o home office fortalece a produtividade.

examples.en: Critics may object that collaboration suffers online.
examples.pt: Críticos podem argumentar que a colaboração sofre online.

examples.en: However, the evidence from three studies suggests otherwise.
examples.pt: Contudo, a evidência de três estudos sugere o contrário.

exercise.question: Complete: "This essay argues that remote work strengthens ___."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "This essay argues that remote work strengthens productivity."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Este ensaio defende que o home office fortalece a produtividade.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Critics may object that collaboration suffers online.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "Critics may object that collaboration suffers online."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Críticos podem argumentar que a colaboração sofre online.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Argumentative Essay Structure — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre argumentative essay structure. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: State your thesis in one sentence, please.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What's your first piece of evidence?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: A 2023 study showed a 13% output increase.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Daily standups close most collaboration gaps.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Remote work, done well, outperforms the office.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Thesis, evidence, counter, rebut, conclude — five clean moves.

scenes.title: The debate in the seminar
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize the argument and rebuttal. Use at least two argumentative connectors.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Kumar's seminar split the class into two camps to argue both sides of the remote-work question.

paragraphs.speaker: Student A
paragraphs.en: This essay argues that distributed teams consistently outperform co-located ones on output metrics.

paragraphs.speaker: Student B
paragraphs.en: Critics may reasonably object that informal collaboration disappears when everyone is online.

paragraphs.speaker: Student A
paragraphs.en: However, structured standups and documented decisions more than compensate for the loss.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Both sides cited evidence, challenged counter-arguments, and concluded with humility — that is the shape of an essay.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: A strong argument, Kumar repeated, is not loud — it is honest enough to answer its own best critic.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Argumentative Essay Structure". Thesis, body paragraphs with claim-evidence-analysis, counter-argument, conclusion. This essay argues that remote work strengthens productivity. Critics may object that collaboration suffers online. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Argumentative Essay Structure". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Argumentative Essay Structure".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
